h269e4367g7ec0g4621ga360ga330052221ba: Has the error of your ways become clear?
h761bb455g11e1g4642gbe01g06ba6f6f2ed1: I would like you to join me.
h0f25c10age808g4bceg932cg72f425d6cba8: Wait at my camp. We can speak there.
h30d3b890g53f2g4730g9cfbgd92ab19c8add: You were careless with your weapon. Let us hope the tadpole has not scrambled all your senses.
haa1411a0gc46dg44edgb068g1e46443fe204: And the longer we wait, the more it consumes.
h8710c896g6890g4630g8da4gd71ba8141615: You will join me. We must find a crèche: our people possess the cure for this infection.
h41786854g9735g4b6ag890eg730033a7e8b6: My people possess the cure for this infection. I must find a crèche; you will join me.
h9aaca7bbgc278g4f2fgaf67g1c4f24d2b8c7: Careful - she obviously sees your kindness as weakness. Don't let her take advantage.
h487cc561gdc7cg4b5agb497g2857643f94fd: A crèche? Do you mean a hatchery?
h967db6bag69abg4405ga303g716c5648125f: And what exactly is a crèche...?
h22fc7c12gcbcdg4963gb378g3d1acdaf8eb1: It is many things. A hatchery, a training grounds, a shelter.
haa3fdec9gea99g4ecfg86bdg1930c6453be4: Githyanki protocol is clear: when infected with a ghaik tadpole, we must report to a caretaker for purification.
h0acc3621g114eg45f4ga32agddf37b3f1878: I thought you already had a cure. With you, right here.
h5235e35egdefdg4c59g8b5fg290bee093532: I made an offer, and you accepted. Your fantasy is not my burden.
h05d692a6gcc24g41bfga971g9a8e3dc9d14b: The Blade of Frontiers has come to your aid. May I suggest a hearty 'thank you'?
ha2a765a1gd832g405fgbffdg03d91cc23c87: A simple 'thank you' wouldn't go amiss.
h5ee8fdeag88d6g4bd3gacb9g4e0157db2169: You may as well suggest a wyvern bow to worms.
hc540e12eg7c2ag4ff8gaccag79cf399a11cf: The cure I offer will suffice as thanks.
h4678b1e9g2bd2g4492g9c27g6ea23d36e97d: Locating a crèche would be wise indeed. Where might we find one?
hff8dfd46g95e8g42d6g80e6gbd3a287fef77: The horned ones mentioned a camp. One there - this Zorru - has seen githyanki.
hddeed089g5594g48d2gb214gbcaf02f39b31: This means a crèche is near.
hd6590321gc4b7g43b3g9c39g09820a3cf7c3: I honour our alliance, kin. Let us seek a crèche.
hbf5ec64dge2e7g4915g97degc2fc4e5bf3d2: An ally from Crèche K'liir - few know such fortune. You will call me Lae'zel.
hc0aeb77bgb71cg4442ga01bg720806b39885: Come. We find this Zorru. And we ask where he has seen our kin.
ha2bfbce3g5baag49cbg9339ge19b6f7c33b8: Join me, then. But I'll be watching you closely.
h3c1c3731g120fg4d13gb124g3d921fc02b36: I welcome our alliance, kin. We will seek out a crèche.
h450c40afgf3b6g415aga5e1g892bfdf2172f: All right - you are welcome to join me.
hfee316aeg0d07g48dag9217ga918306ffea8: All right, we journey together. Let's find this crèche.
hf94fac7bgab98g4facg892bg68cb9d685e19: You do not have the authority. Defer to your leader.
h2ce679ddgffdcg4426ga95dg332b89c119d5: You are full up. Dismiss your weakest warrior.
h7e337659gce8ag4c8bga2cbgd1772f5413c3: Wait at my camp. We can speak there.
h64d245e6g8083g4b12g8607gaeb3f80eb565: Very well. But heed my words.
h6600d292gd0c1g4ed2gacedg28983d75b7c4: The horned ones mentioned a camp. One there - this Zorru - has seen githyanki.
haf549d48g8b7cg49e9g9929g38994dc409c3: A crèche must be near. I must interrogate this Zorru. Our very lives depend on it.
h784d831bg7c6dg4dbcgbc80g94dc009f9e0e: I will be at your camp. Do not keep me waiting.
h5d5dc6cegbb7dg4eafg874ag9f1ac2027747: The horned hunters mentioned a sighting - one among them has seen our kind.
h53734f5eg4313g405ag9eb5g62e5b53b45a2: The horned hunters mentioned a sighting - one among them has seen my kind.
hee770f85gcf9cg42feg95bdg93f7d4379bd5: We scout the roads and scan the skies for children of Gith. They will lead us to a crèche. There, we will be purified.
h6f3f7213gcdd4g4422ga66ag626d2decffc6: You have made an ally from Crèche K'liir - few know such fortune. Call me Lae'zel.
hc1b2e0b4gda7cg426dgadadgf99c414ba981: I'll trust your judgement - but I won't trust her. Not until I've gotten the measure of her.
ha4576a06gb489g4682gb059g097fec8934a1: You've a sharp tongue, elf. Would that your mind proved its equal.
hc75d86degd796g4a09gbba4g6d6e5df37f72: Half-elf. I suppose the finer details are lost on a creature like you.
h8b58870fg3f6dg499dg873fge59ab6596abc: Fool. No point in showing a mad dog kindness - it'll still bite you in the end.

h9dcc3f0bg8bd4g4e0egade1ge0a0c49c932a: Come. The horned ones mentioned a camp. One there - this Zorru - has seen githyanki.

h67bad104gb009g4607ga50eg2e480ea015d2: You're clearly no friend to tieflings. We'll go our separate ways, I think.
h8d65153bg40deg46ccg8f60geaec2961dc29: We'll go our separate ways, I think.
hfe969ac6g3c00g4cdeg802bgcf937bfbfef6: Scowl all you like - you have my answer.
hee28f6dfgff59g4f64ga02agf17bf3fd8b9c: I'm dreadfully curious: might one neutralise the tadpole while keeping its powers?
hb5b2dda9g107dg4f19g8e9dgd69471d588a6: I know my teachings. There are no half measures.
